pre_mission.speaker: Zephyr
pre_mission.line: You all looked terribly outnumbered. It offended my sense of balance.

pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: Who makes an entrance during an ambush?

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: I cannot believe this is happening, and yet it is helping.

battle_start.speaker: Zephyr
battle_start.line: I will take the loud route.

post_mission.speaker: Zephyr
post_mission.line: Zephyr. Storm caller. Occasional hero. Reliable threat to dull conversation.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: You will fit in terribly well.
